case_title: BARDIA FARAHMAND et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, EXCEPT PLAINTIFF ISABEL NUNEZ WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY GIOVANTI HUMPHRIES--ASSISTANT VICE PRESIDENT. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY FARAHMAND, BARDIA NUNEZ, ISABEL AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARAHMAND, BARDIA NUNEZ, ISABEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FARAHMAND, BARDIA NUNEZ, ISABEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (CSC - AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARAHMAND, BARDIA AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2013 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-05-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF FARAHMAND, BARDIA NUNEZ, ISABEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-05-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO OCT-10-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS WERE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS WERE REPRESENTED BY NASROLLAH FARAHMAND--FATHER. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROBERTO BELLO-CAJINA--BANK MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
